controlling_audit_evidence.description: PR 94 terminal and result-first research program
Broad mechanism pool and narrow formal validation addendum

lineage_evidence.duplicate_adjudication: NO_EXACT_DUPLICATE. US46 is fixed-weight QQQ/GLD failure memory, while the current line is an eight-mechanism scheduled-event development atlas. Infrastructure improvements cannot reopen US46.

prior_local_qualification.relevant_finding: The existing accepted-session research calendar covers only 2018-01-02 through 2026-07-06 and is explicitly PIT-unqualified; it cannot cover the 1994-2009 development split.

existing_tlt.development_pre_inception: 1994-01-01 through 2002-07-21 is structurally unavailable for TLT and may not be synthesized

read_only_local_evidence.expiration_identity: No complete accepted official historical standard monthly and quarterly expiration snapshot exists locally.

official_source_routes_identified_not_in.component: FOMC dates, materials and statement timing
TLT official product identity and inception

required_vs_observed.required: official event table with exact actual timestamps, immutable source hashes and revision or cancellation lineage
required_vs_observed.observed: official archive routes identified but no accepted materialized event table

required_vs_observed.required: SPY one-minute data covering every qualified development window from 1994 through 2009
required_vs_observed.observed: daily SPY rows only; zero local SPY minute rows

required_vs_observed.required: TLT one-minute extended-hours data from inception through 2009 for applicable M8 events
required_vs_observed.observed: zero local TLT minute rows; pre-2002-07-22 events structurally inapplicable

required_vs_observed.required: accepted NYSE calendar covering 1994 through 2009 with early and unscheduled close identity
required_vs_observed.observed: canonical calendar empty; research-only calendar begins in 2018 and is PIT-unqualified

required_vs_observed.required: accepted complete historical standard monthly and quarterly expiration identity
required_vs_observed.observed: no complete local accepted expiration snapshot

required_vs_observed.required: at least 24 complete events, 6 years and 95 percent completeness for every M1 through M8 before any outcome
required_vs_observed.observed: cannot be computed without the preceding event, minute and calendar identities

decisive_blockers: No qualified SPY or TLT one-minute dataset exists locally.
No accepted materialized official event table with exact historical timestamps and revision identity exists.
No accepted 1994-2009 NYSE session calendar exists locally.
TLT did not exist before 2002-07-22 and that interval cannot be synthesized or replaced.
No accepted complete historical options and futures expiration identity exists.
Daily bars cannot identify or separate the frozen intraday event windows.

terminal_adjudication.why_no_module: Without an executable qualified input, an event-return module would be unused mainline code and could silently harden unverified assumptions. The smallest honest checkpoint is the frozen definition plus this fail-closed input result.
terminal_adjudication.next_decision: External review may accept the frozen definition and terminal input blocker. A later data-only task must independently qualify the exact event, minute and calendar identities before implementation or outcomes.

validation.git_scope: exactly this qualification file and the frozen definition file
